subparts.text: Which part of a building receives maximum heat and why?
Define Time Lag. What are its units?
What do you understand by ‘U’ value of a window/wall?
What do you understand by Horizontal Shadow Angle? Explain with a sketch.
What is Solar Heat Gain Co-efficient? Give its units. If the solar transmittance is 91% and the glass absorbed re-radiated heat is 2%, what is the SHGC of the glass?
What are the 3 types of shading devices for a window? Explain with neat sketches.
Draw a clear and detailed diagram showing the movement of the Earth around the Sun in 1 year showing the Spring and Autumn Equinox.

What is the solar angle of incidence for a place on 28 degrees S latitude at 1 pm on 22 Dec, on a south facing wall ? Use the given solar chart and cosine table values. Cos 35=0.82; Cos 36=0.81; Cos 37=0.80; cos 161= -0.945; Cos 162= -0.951; cos 163= -0.956; cos-1 0.76=138.59; cos-1 0.77=140.35; cos-1 0.78=141.26; cos-1 0.79=142.18
If the width of the horizontal shading device of a window, is 0.75m and the window height is 1.5m, what is the projection factor? Name the Building Code which gives us the M adjustment factor?
